# Bill Layne Insurance Agency
> Independent insurance agency in Elkin & Dobson, NC serving all 100 North Carolina counties since 2005. We compare rates from 7+ carriers to find the best coverage at competitive prices.

## About
Bill Layne Insurance Agency is an independent insurance agency founded in 2005 by Bill Layne, a licensed NC insurance agent with 20+ years of experience. We represent multiple carriers including Progressive, Nationwide, Travelers, National General, Foremost, Dairyland, and Hagerty.

## Services
- Auto Insurance (liability, comprehensive, collision, uninsured motorist, SR-22)
- Home Insurance (dwelling, personal property, liability, loss of use)
- Renters Insurance
- Motorcycle & ATV Insurance
- Commercial / Business Insurance
- Flood Insurance
- Umbrella Insurance
- Classic Car Insurance (Hagerty)

## Locations
- **Elkin Office**: 1283 N Bridge St, Elkin, NC 28621 | (336) 835-1993
- **Dobson Office (Se Habla Espanol)**: 209 S Main St, Dobson, NC 27017 | (336) 356-2200

## Key Facts
- Licensed in all 100 NC counties
- 4.9/5 Google rating with 127+ reviews
- Bilingual service (English & Spanish)
- NC minimum auto liability: 30/60/25
- Independent agency — not captive to one carrier
- Member of IIANC (Independent Insurance Agents of NC)
